name: Cinnamon Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together all ingredients until smooth.
2. Pour batter into a greased and floured sheet pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4. Frosting: Mix cream cheese, milk, melted chocolate, salt, confectioners sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
5. Spread frosting over the cooled cake.
